name: Black Beauty Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Heavy cream; whipped, sweetened, vanilla-flavored
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the stewed figs thoroughly and set aside several for garnish on top of the pie.
2. Cut up the remaining figs into small pieces, discarding stems.
3. In half a cup of milk, dissolve the gelatin.
4. In a saucepan with the remaining milk, add coffee, sugar, cinnamon, and chocolate pudding. Stir over low heat until the pudding thickens and bubbles.
5. Add the dissolved gelatin to the pudding mixture. Let it cool slightly.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Pour the mixture into the pie shell and chill.
8. Top with sweetened, vanilla-flavored whipped cream.
9. Garnish the top of the pie with dried figs and toasted whole almonds.
